name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of three children swinging on a rope with a tiger. The main character was children, kite flying in park. The mood was happy.

The story begins:
 "They were all young boys from the neighborhood who used to play together at their neighbor Kukrukhovka lake near Moscow and now lived opposite one another."
